title: BlockArmorNew
description: This mod adds the ability to craft armor from different blocks and with different effects.
body:
This mod adds the ability to craft armor from different blocks and with different effects. The effects only start working when a full set of armor is worn.
_____________________________________________________________
Reservation list for the latest version:

Stone Armor-crafted from stone protects like leather armor

Diorite Armor-crafted from diorite protects like leather armor

Dirt Armor-crafted from dirt, full set protects by 4 units

Sugar Cane Armor-Crafted from cane and thread, the full set gives the effect of speed.

Azalea Leaves Armor-armor is crafted from azalea leaves. The full set allows you to become invisible when holding down the shift key, but hunger is depleted faster.

Obsidian Armor-crafted from obsidian, the full set provides the same protection as diamond armor and has greater durability than diamond armor, but each piece has a slowing effect.

Honey Armor-crafted from honeycomb blocks, the full set provides a regeneration effect.

Glass Armor-crafted from glass, it provides weak protection and breaks easily.

Prismarine Armor-сrafted from prismarine, the full set gives the effect of dolphin grace in water, underwater breathing.

Magma Armor-сrafted from magma cream, the full set with the shift key held down gives the effect of fire resistance.

TNT Armor-сrafted from dynamite, if the armor owner is killed, an explosion occurs at the place of death.
